title: 3-year practice condition to become judge needed to understand courtroom realities: Justice Rajesh Bindal retires
description: Supreme Court Justice Rajesh Bindal on Wednesday said that mandating prior legal practice before joining the judiciary as munsiff/ magistrate helps young judges understand courtroom functioning and the realities faced by litigants and lawyers.Justice Bindal demitted office today. Speaking at his farewell function organised by the Supreme Court Bar Association (SCBA), he reflected on earlier practices in judicial recruitment and training.
